zh.lifeSummary: Adelaide of Chalon II是Thibaut of Chalon的女兒，出生。她與de Chalon結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1080年在艾歐洛。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Adelaide of Chalon II是Thibaut of Chalon的女儿，出生。她与de Chalon结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1080年在艾歐洛。

nameMeanings.name: Chalon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Jean-Yves, Francois, Valmore.
French: variant of   Charron   and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this.

variants.name: Charron
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Armand, Donat, Lucien, Marcel, Alphonse, Emile, Laurent, Normand, Renald, Yves, Adrien.

French: metonymic occupational name for a cartwright, from Old French charron ‘cart’ (from Latin carro, genitive carronis, a derivative of carrum ‘cart’). Compare Charon , Sharon , Sharron , and Sharrow .

History: Pierre Charron dit Ducharme from Meaux in Seine-et-Marne, France, married Catherine Pillard in Montreal, QC, in 1665; see also Ducharme . Jean Charron dit Laferrière from Saintes in Charente-Maritime, France, married Anne d'Anneville in Quebec City, QC, in 1669; see also Laferriere . Charles Charron dit Larose and Cabanac from Chartres in Eure-et-Loir, France, married Élisabeth Poupard in Montreal, QC, in 1713.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Japanese: written 井伊 ‘well’ and ‘that’, the name one of Japan's great daimyō families, originally based in Tōtōmi (now part of Shizuoka prefecture), later in Kōzuke (now Gunma prefecture) and Ōmi (now Shiga prefecture). Other variants of the name substitute either character with similar sounding characters such as 飯 ‘cooked rice’, 居 ‘residence’, and so forth. It was formerly Romanized as Iyi. — Note: In the population figure published by the US Census Bureau, the Roman number II (meaning ‘the second’, i.e. ‘the younger’ of the two bearers of the name) is apparently also counted as a surname Ii.

History: Ii Naomasa (1561–1602) was awarded lands in Kōzuke and Ōmi for his service in the civil wars that won the shōgunate (military dictatorship) for Tokugawa Ieyasu. His family built the beautiful castle of Hikone, which still stands. His descendant Ii Naosuke (1815–1860) ruled Japan for two years as Tairō (Great Elder) and played a major part in signing treaties that opened Japan to foreign trade at the end of the Tokugawa Shōgunate. He was assassinated by adherents of the anti-foreign party.

nameMeanings.name: Adelaide
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic origin (via French Adélaïde ), from adal ‘noble’ + heid ‘kind, sort’. It was borne in the 10th century by the wife of the Holy Roman Emperor Otto the Great. She became regent after his death and was revered as a saint. The given name increased in popularity in England during the 19th century, when it was borne by the wife of King William IV; she was the daughter of the ruler of the German duchy of Saxe-Meiningen. The Australian city of Adelaide was named in her honour.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

en.lifeSummary: Adelaide of Chalon II was born as the daughter of Thibaut of Chalon. She married de Chalon. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1080, in Europe.

fr.lifeSummary: Adelaide of Chalon II est née, fille de Thibaut of Chalon. Elle a épousé de Chalon. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1080, à Europe.

de.lifeSummary: Adelaide of Chalon II wurde, als Tochter von Thibaut of Chalon geboren. Sie hat de Chalon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1080 in Europa.

it.lifeSummary: Adelaide of Chalon II è nata il come figlia di Thibaut of Chalon. Lei sposato de Chalon. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1080, nel Europa.

ja.lifeSummary: Adelaide of Chalon IIはThibaut of Chalonの娘として生まれた。de Chalonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1080年にヨーロッパで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Adelaide of Chalon II(은)는 Thibaut of Chalon의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 de Chalon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1080년 우럽에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Adelaide of Chalon II nasceu filha de Thibaut of Chalon. Ela casou-se com de Chalon. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1080, em Europa.

ru.lifeSummary: Adelaide of Chalon II родилась. Её отца звали Thibaut of Chalon. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени de Chalon. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1080 г. в местности Европа.

es.lifeSummary: Adelaide of Chalon II nació como hija de Thibaut of Chalon. Se casó con de Chalon. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1080, en Europa.
